## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new action
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Related issue

Closes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `npm run validate` locally — no syntax errors
- [ ] Tested the affected script locally with `GITHUB_USERNAME=... node scripts/...`
- [ ] Verified the README section updates correctly (or unchanged when expected)

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused — one thing per PR
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added
- [ ] Existing behavior is not broken
- [ ] README or action reference updated if inputs/outputs changed
